title: Caribou Lurks in the Shadows
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, King Neptune. The central beat is caribou lurks in the shadows.
scene: The scene focuses on caribou lurks in the shadows, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, King Neptune shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Why would you say no, jinbe?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yeah, you should join the crew, boss-man!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: And Luffy, you need to rest.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I am extremely grateful for the invitation.

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Luffy certainly likes this man a lot!

summary: Caribou Lurks in the Shadows. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
